title: Zombie Invade Nether End
description: 僵尸大量入侵下界和末地 —— Datapack that lets zombies spawn in the Nether and the End in quantity
body:
## 僵尸入侵下界末地

> 僵尸几乎入侵了整个世界！由于感染，各地几乎惨绝人寰……
> 
> —— 来自 _下界/末地早报_

一个在下界和末地中大幅增加僵尸生成的数据包，同时减少本地生物。

它主要用于 [Zombie Invade 100 Days](https://modrinth.com/modpack/zombie-invade-100-days)（僵尸入侵 100 天）整合包，并且已经包含在其中。

## Zombie Invade Nether End

> Zombies are almostly invade the whole world! The native are nearly extinct because of the infection.
> 
> —— From _Nether/End Newspaper_

A datapack that add spawn of zombies in the Nether and the End, meanwhile decrease the native mobs.

It's mainly for the modpack [Zombie Invade 100 Days](https://modrinth.com/modpack/zombie-invade-100-days), and it's already included in the modpack.
